attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY     AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY ,
COALESCE(NCPCT.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,-999) AS  REBOK_RPRT_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REBOK_PGTMV_PTNR_CNTRY_PTY_KEY ,
NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY AS  REBOK_PGTMV_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I'	 ACTION_CODE,
'I'	  DML_TYPE,
SOMN.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL AS PARTNER_CERTIFICATION_CD

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL SOMN
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSMT  
ON SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSMT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSMT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
AND TRIM(NSMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'MANUAL'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT
ON SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'

SELECT
EOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,EOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOMN.SAV_ID
,EOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOMN.START_DATE
,EOMN.STATUS_CODE
,EOMN.CREATION_DATE
,EOMN.USER_NAME
,EOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOMN.BATCH_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL EOMN
WHERE EOMN.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER' AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL SOMN
WHERE SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER')

SELECT
SOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOMN.SAV_ID
,SOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOMN.START_DATE
,SOMN.STATUS_CODE
,SOMN.CREATION_DATE
,SOMN.USER_NAME
,SOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOMN.BATCH_ID
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL SOMN
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSMT  
ON SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSMT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSMT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
AND TRIM(NSMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'MANUAL'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT
ON SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'
AND (NSMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY IS NULL
OR NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL)
